narrative: Iran strikes on US facilities in Jordan and Bahrain drive a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY holds at 162.97 as 275bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand; gold higher +1.06%; equities +0.89%; DXY steady -0.05%; VIX 17.5. GBP/USD at 1.3373 leads G10 weakness (1W avg -0.503%) as options market shows put skew via -0.64 risk reversal. Watch ECB Rate Decision tomorrow at 12:15 UTC.
